creator: fernan.aguero@gmail.com
text:
<precise description of the problem (multiple lines)>
	
	FASTA is reportedly broken, as the old distfiles have been
	removed from upstream sources.
	http://pointyhat-west.isc.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/a.7.4-release.20110113192327.pointyhat-west/fasta3-35.4.9.log

	Upgrade FASTA to latest v.36, and fix the fetch issue

Fix: <how to correct or work around the problem, if known (multiple lines)>





--0003255763fe784d3e049a98d5d1

Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="fasta3.diff"

diff --exclude CVS -u /usr/ports/biology/fasta3/Makefile fasta3/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/biology/fasta3/Makefile	2009-08-23 12:47:37.000000000 -0300
+++ fasta3/Makefile	2011-01-21 18:15:44.000000000 -0300
@@ -7,9 +7,9 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=	fasta3
-PORTVERSION=	35.4.9
+PORTVERSION=	36.3.2
 CATEGORIES=	biology
-MASTER_SITES=	http://faculty.virginia.edu/wrpearson/fasta/fasta3/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://faculty.virginia.edu/wrpearson/fasta/fasta36/
 DISTNAME=	fasta-${PORTVERSION}

 MAINTAINER=	fernan@iib.unsam.edu.ar
@@ -34,12 +34,12 @@
 DATA=		data/*.mat
 EXAMPLES=	seq/*.aa seq/*.lc seq/*.seq seq/*.lib

-MAN1=		fasta35.1 map_db.1 ps_lav.1 pvcomp.1
-MLINKS=		fasta35.1 tfasta35.1 fasta35.1 fastx35.1 fasta35.1 tfastx35.1  \
-		fasta35.1 fasty35.1  fasta35.1 tfasty35.1 fasta35.1 ssearch35.1 \
-		fasta35.1 fastf35.1 fasta35.1 fasts35.1 fasta35.1 tfasts35.1 \
-		fasta35.1 fastm35.1 fasta35.1 tfastf35.1 fasta35.1 ggsearch35.1 \
-		fasta35.1 lalign35.1 fasta35.1 prss35.1 fasta35.1 prfx35.1
+MAN1=		fasta36.1 fastf3.1 fasts3.1 prss3.1 map_db.1 ps_lav.1
+MLINKS=		fasta36.1 tfasta35.1 fasta36.1 fastx35.1 fasta36.1 tfastx35.1  \
+		fasta36.1 fasty35.1  fasta36.1 tfasty35.1 fasta36.1 ssearch35.1 \
+		fasta36.1 fastf35.1 fasta36.1 fasts35.1 fasta36.1 tfasts35.1 \
+		fasta36.1 fastm35.1 fasta36.1 tfastf35.1 fasta36.1 ggsearch35.1 \
+		fasta36.1 lalign35.1 fasta36.1 prss35.1 fasta36.1 prfx35.1
 PLIST_SUB=	VER=${PORTVERSION:R:R}

 post-patch:
diff --exclude CVS -u /usr/ports/biology/fasta3/distinfo fasta3/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/biology/fasta3/distinfo	2009-08-23 12:47:37.000000000 -0300
+++ fasta3/distinfo	2011-01-21 18:03:08.000000000 -0300
@@ -1,3 +1,2 @@
-MD5 (fasta-35.4.9.tar.gz) = 6bf19b771f2c64287b7713864b9f0a69
-SHA256 (fasta-35.4.9.tar.gz) =
4beaed42557572a1c8e5480e93641af175fa43c545f75c4bf06db62dced6bd39
-SIZE (fasta-35.4.9.tar.gz) = 630748
+SHA256 (fasta-36.3.2.tar.gz) =
1eddb7dac3a52311d43bac854b2153c13aa23cbb163952c9e385a75aa2b9e446
+SIZE (fasta-36.3.2.tar.gz) = 711876
Common subdirectories: /usr/ports/biology/fasta3/files and fasta3/files
diff --exclude CVS -u /usr/ports/biology/fasta3/pkg-plist fasta3/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/biology/fasta3/pkg-plist	2009-06-09 04:53:37.000000000 -0300
+++ fasta3/pkg-plist	2011-01-21 18:26:39.000000000 -0300
@@ -17,7 +17,6 @@
 bin/lalign%%VER%%
 bin/lav2ps
 bin/lav2svg
-bin/list_db
 bin/map_db
 bin/ssearch%%VER%%
 bin/ssearch%%VER%%_t
@@ -39,10 +38,6 @@
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/fasta3x.doc
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/fasta20.doc
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/fasta_func.doc
-%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/readme.mpi_3.3
-%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/readme.pvm_3.2
-%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/readme.pvm_3.3
-%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/readme.pvm_3.4
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/readme.v30
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/readme.v30t6
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/readme.v30t7
@@ -52,12 +47,14 @@
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/readme.v33t0
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/readme.v34t0
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/readme.v35
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/readme.v36
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/readme.w32
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/fasta.defaults
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/fasta.options
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/fasta_versions.html
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/changes_v34.html
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/changes_v35.html
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/changes_v36.html
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/egmsmg.aa
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gstt1_drome.aa
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gtm1_human.aa
@@ -95,6 +92,7 @@
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/hsgstm1b.seq
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/humgstd.seq
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/mgstm1.seq
+%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/mgstm1_genclone.seq
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/mgtt2_x.seq
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/titin_hum.seq
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/mu.lib
